titles.title: Did You Ever Talked to Hod

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Did you ever talk to God above? Tell Him that you need a friend to love. Pray in Jesus’ name believing that God answers prayer.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Have you told Him all your cares and woes? Ev’ry tiny little fear He knows. You can know He’ll always hear And He will answer prayer.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You can whisper in a crowd to Him. You can cry when you’re alone to Him. You don’t have to pray out loud to Him; He knows your thoughts.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: On a lofty mountain peak, He’s there. In a meadow by a stream, He’s there. Anywhere on earth you go, He’s been there from the start.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Find the answer in His Word; it’s true. You’ll be strong because He walks with you. By His faithfulness He’ll change you, too. God answers prayer.
